_meta.description: Gold-standard evaluation dataset for TreatBot matching engine

labels.eligible: Patient clearly meets all key inclusion criteria and no exclusion criteria
labels.ineligible: Patient fails one or more hard criteria (age, ECOG, cancer type mismatch, etc.)
labels.uncertain: Patient may qualify but missing key information or borderline on criteria

uncertain_subtypes.missing_data: Key eligibility field is absent or not assessed; the correct product behavior is to ask for more data instead of excluding the patient.
uncertain_subtypes.borderline_risk: Known facts create material exclusion risk, but available evidence is insufficient for a deterministic hard exclusion.
